title: koeleria tenuipes
intro: Koeleria tenuipes, also known as the slender hair-grass, is a species of grass native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Koeleria tenuipes include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Koeleria tenuipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
